perturbation.original_text: This Amendment will apply and be effective only with respect to the provisions of the Non- Competition Agreement specifically referred to herein. Except as otherwise set forth in this Amendment, the Non-Competition Agreement will continue in full force and effect in accordance with its terms.
perturbation.changed_text: This Amendment will apply to all the provisions of the Non- Competition Agreement whether specifically mentioned herein or not. Except as otherwise set forth in this Amendment, the Non-Competition Agreement will continue in full force and effect only if consistent with this amendment's objectives.
perturbation.explanation: The revised text broadens the scope of the amendment's impact, stating it applies to all provisions of the Non-Competition Agreement, regardless of whether they are specifically mentioned. This contrasts with the original text, which limited the amendment's effect to specifically referenced provisions. The added condition that the original agreement remains in effect only if consistent with the amendment's objectives introduces further ambiguity and potential conflicts, as the 'objectives' are not clearly defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Amendment will apply to all the provisions of the Non- Competition Agreement whether specifically mentioned herein or not. Except as otherwise set forth in this Amendment, the Non-Competition Agreement will continue in full force and effect only if consistent with this amendment's objectives. 1 5. Master Framework Agreement. This Amendment is governed by the Master Framework Agreement, including, without limitation, the provisions of Sections 4 (Confidentiality) and 6 (Miscellaneous) of the Master Framework Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text broadens the scope of the amendment's impact, stating it applies to all provisions of the Non-Competition Agreement, regardless of whether they are specifically mentioned. This contrasts with the original text, which limited the amendment's effect to specifically referenced provisions. The added condition that the original agreement remains in effect only if consistent with the amendment's objectives introduces further ambiguity and potential conflicts. Since the Changed Text and the Contradicted Text are exactly the same, the explanation provided in the prompt indicates that a contradiction was introduced.
